//: Marker file — sets the module type for all .js files under conformance/ that don't have a nearer package.json overriding it. The agent's root package.json declares type: module (Part 1 of plan 2026-04-15-003) so bundler consumers can tree-shake @faultsense/agent properly. That setting cascades to every .js file under packages/agent/ unless a closer package.json overrides it. The files under conformance/shared/ (scenarios.js, assertions, etc.) and conformance/scripts/ (generate-matrix.js) are deliberately CommonJS — they're consumed by plain Node scripts via require() AND by Playwright TypeScript drivers via import, and staying CJS lets both paths work without an intermediate build step. This file marks the conformance subtree as CJS so the agent's ESM setting doesn't accidentally reinterpret them. The 7 framework harnesses under conformance/<framework>/ already have their own package.json files, so they keep their own settings unchanged.
